ArgonTest.Name: Type method concrete
ArgonTest.InputSource:
import Ar._
class A <: Any
public def _.withInt(T: type): (T, Int).type = T, Int
public new() end end
proc printStringInt (s: String, i: Int): () do puts s puts (i.to_s()) end
proc main(): () do val a = A.new() val pair: a.withInt String = ''Hello World'', 5 printStringInt pair end
